raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Sirs, I am writing to you regarding the dispute associated with my card ending in XXXX, regarding an unauthorized charge of {$810.00} made on XX/XX/year>, under case XXXX. 
I wish to attest that I do not recognize this transaction and that I have filed the appropriate disputes in a timely manner. Despite this, my appeal was denied without taking into account the evidence I attached. 
Currently, the Best Buy store has confirmed to me that this transaction does not correspond to their system under the reference number you manage. Additionally, I am in the process of filing a police report for fraud in XXXX, Texas. 
Based on the above, I formally request : XXXX. That I be granted an extension of the payment deadline for the alleged debt, until the investigation is resolved. 
XXXX. That I be assured that my account will not be closed nor will my credit history be affected while the case remains in dispute. 
XXXX. That I be issued a detailed, official denial letter in writing, stating the specific reasons why my disputes have been rejected. 
I am again enclosing copies of my appeal, proof of submission, and previous communications. 
I thank you in advance for your attention and cooperation in thoroughly reviewing this case.
